technicalSEO.title: Postcards – Custom Postcard Printing | Banners.com
technicalSEO.metaDescription: Design and print custom postcards for business or personal use in minutes. Our postcards a printed in full color on premium cardstock. Available in glossy or matte finish.

Custom Postcards for Business Marketing & Personal Communications

High-Quality Cardstock Postcards with Full-Color Custom Printing & Quick Turnaround

PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Size: 4" x 5.625" Standard Postcard Size Quantity: Choose Your Postcard Quantity Paper: Premium 12.4pt Cardstock Finish: Gloss or Matte Coating Production Time: 1-5 Business Days Available Upload Artwork: Professional Design Services Available PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Postcard Printing for Direct Mail Marketing & Personal Communications

Create professional custom postcards perfect for direct mail marketing campaigns, personal communications, and promotional outreach. Our full-color postcards are digitally printed on premium 12.4 pt, 120 lb. coverstock paper with your choice of gloss or matte finish.

Each custom postcard measures 4.00" x 5.625" - the standard size for direct mail marketing and personal use. This size qualifies for USPS postcard rates, making your marketing campaigns more cost-effective.

Professional design services are available for $60 per hour to help create eye-catching postcards that drive results for your business or personal communications.

Custom Postcard Specifications

  • Material: Premium 12.4 pt, 120 lb. coverstock paper
  • Size: 4.00" x 5.625" (standard postcard dimensions)
  • Printing: Full-color digital printing
  • Finish Options: Gloss or matte coating
  • Production: 1-5 business day turnaround available
  • Design Services: Professional design assistance available
PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Premium Cardstock Material for Professional Custom Postcards

Our custom postcards are printed on premium 12.4 pt, 120 lb. coverstock paper that provides the perfect balance of durability and professional appearance for marketing and personal communications.

Cardstock Material Benefits

  • Professional Thickness: 12.4 pt thickness feels substantial in recipients' hands
  • Durable Weight: 120 lb. coverstock resists bending during mailing
  • High-Quality Printing: Smooth surface accepts vibrant digital printing
  • USPS Compatible: Meets postal requirements for standard postcard rates
  • Archival Quality: Premium paper stock maintains color vibrancy over time

This cardstock weight is specifically chosen for postcards because it provides excellent print quality while meeting postal service thickness requirements for automated processing and standard postcard rates.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Gloss & Matte Finishing Options for Custom Postcard Printing

Choose between gloss or matte coating to achieve the perfect look and feel for your custom postcards. Both finishes provide protection while offering distinct visual and tactile experiences.

Gloss Finish Postcards

  • Vibrant color reproduction with enhanced saturation
  • Smooth, shiny surface that reflects light
  • Professional appearance ideal for marketing materials
  • Excellent for photo-heavy designs and bright graphics
  • Protective coating resists fingerprints and moisture

Matte Finish Postcards

  • Sophisticated, non-reflective surface
  • Easy to write on with pen or pencil
  • Reduces glare for better readability
  • Premium feel with subtle texture
  • Ideal for text-heavy designs and elegant presentations

Both finishes are applied as a protective coating during the printing process, ensuring your custom postcards maintain their professional appearance through mailing and handling.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Fast Production Times for Custom Postcard Orders

We offer flexible production schedules from 1 to 5 business days to meet your timeline and budget needs. Production time begins after artwork approval and file upload completion.

1 Business Day Priority Production

  • Ultra-fast turnaround for urgent campaigns
  • Same-day emergency rushes available in some cases
  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process next business day
  • Contact customer service for emergency options

2 Business Days Express Production

  • Quick turnaround with slightly more flexibility
  • Popular choice for time-sensitive marketing
  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process next business day
  • Emergency options available upon request

3 Business Days Standard Production

  • Most popular production option
  • Free with most orders
  • Ideal balance of speed and value
  • Sufficient time for quality control processes

5 Business Days Saver Production

  • Budget-friendly option for advance planning
  • Lower cost when timing is flexible
  • Perfect for large quantity orders
  • Allows extra time for complex designs

Important: Production time excludes shipping time. If your order requires proofing or has prepress issues, production begins after approval. Turnaround times are calculated from file upload completion.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Secure Payment Options for Custom Postcard Printing

All custom postcards must be paid for prior to production to ensure timely processing of your order. We offer multiple secure payment methods for your convenience.

Accepted Credit Cards

  • Visa
  • MasterCard
  • American Express
  • Discover

Check Payment Option

  • Business and personal checks accepted
  • Check must be received before production begins
  • May extend overall delivery time
  • Contact customer service for check payment procedures

Payment Processing Timeline

Your credit card will not be charged until you approve your custom postcard order. This ensures you have the opportunity to review all details, including artwork, quantity, and specifications before payment is processed.

For large quantity orders or extended payment terms, contact our customer service team to discuss available options for your business needs.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Postcard Shipping & Delivery Guidelines

Custom postcards are produced at our Minnesota facility and shipped nationwide. We offer multiple shipping options to meet your delivery timeline and budget requirements.

Available Shipping Methods

  • Standard Shipping: 3-5 business days
  • Three Day: 3 business days
  • Two Day: 2 business days
  • Overnight: 1 business day
  • UPS Overnight AM: Morning delivery
  • Economy Shipping: Budget option with longer delivery

Shipping Coverage & Tracking

  • 1-3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States
  • Tracking number provided once shipped
  • Shipping costs based on weight and destination
  • Additional charges apply to large quantity orders

International Shipping

International shipments require customer-provided shipping labels and customs documentation. We accept international labels from USPS and UPS only. Contact customer service for international shipping assistance.

Shipping Protection Policy

After shipment, all carrier terms apply for delays or loss. Damaged items must be returned for replacement. Lost packages are replaced after carrier confirms loss (typically 7-10 business days after scheduled delivery).

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Business Marketing & Personal Uses for Custom Postcards

Custom postcards are versatile marketing tools and personal communication pieces that deliver your message directly to recipients' hands. Explore popular applications for business and personal use.

Business Marketing Uses

  • Direct mail marketing campaigns
  • New customer acquisition mailings
  • Product or service announcements
  • Grand opening and event promotions
  • Real estate marketing and listings
  • Restaurant menu highlights and specials
  • Seasonal sales and holiday promotions
  • Trade show follow-up communications
  • Customer loyalty and retention programs
  • Professional service reminders

Personal Communication Uses

  • Wedding announcements and invitations
  • Birth announcements and baby photos
  • Graduation announcements
  • Holiday greetings and family updates
  • Moving announcements with new addresses
  • Party invitations and event notifications
  • Thank you cards for special occasions
  • Travel postcards and vacation memories
  • Personal branding for photographers and artists
  • Save the date cards for special events

The standard 4" x 5.625" size qualifies for USPS postcard rates, making direct mail campaigns more cost-effective than standard letter mail.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Postcard Artwork Requirements & File Guidelines

Submit print-ready artwork or work with our professional designers to create custom postcards that make a lasting impression. Follow these guidelines for best printing results.

Preferred File Types

  • Vector Files: .eps or .ai (Adobe Illustrator) with fonts converted to outlines
  • High-Resolution PDFs: Print-ready with embedded fonts
  • High-Resolution JPGs: 300 DPI minimum resolution
  • Professional Formats: Native design files from Adobe Creative Suite

Artwork Specifications

  • Final size: 4.00" x 5.625" with bleed area
  • Resolution: 300 DPI for all images and graphics
  • Color mode: CMYK for accurate color reproduction
  • Bleed: 0.125" bleed area around all edges
  • Safe area: Keep important text 0.25" from edges

Professional Design Services

Our graphic design team can create custom postcards from your concepts, photos, and text. Design services are charged at $60 per hour and include:

  • Custom layout and design creation
  • Photo editing and enhancement
  • Logo integration and branding
  • Text formatting and typography
  • Color correction and optimization

Color Matching Services

For color-critical projects, our Color Match Proof System ensures accurate color reproduction. This service is recommended for brand-specific colors and professional marketing materials.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Postcards for Marketing & Personal Use Today

Ready to create professional custom postcards that get results? Our streamlined ordering process makes it easy to design, print, and deliver high-quality postcards for any purpose.

Simple 3-Step Ordering Process

Step 1: Choose Your Specifications

Select your quantity, finish (gloss or matte), and production timeline. Our standard 4" x 5.625" size is perfect for direct mail campaigns and personal communications while qualifying for postcard postage rates.

Step 2: Upload Your Artwork

Upload your print-ready files or request professional design services. Our team will review your artwork and contact you if any adjustments are needed for optimal printing results.

Step 3: Approve and Production Begins

Review your order details, approve your artwork, and we'll begin production immediately. You'll receive tracking information once your custom postcards ship.

Why Choose Our Custom Postcard Printing

  • Premium 12.4 pt cardstock for professional results
  • Full-color digital printing with vibrant reproduction
  • Choice of gloss or matte protective finishes
  • Fast 1-5 business day production options
  • Professional design services available
  • Secure online ordering with multiple payment options
  • Nationwide shipping with tracking
  • Expert customer service support

Start your custom postcard project today and discover why businesses and individuals nationwide trust us for their printing needs. Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 for assistance with large orders or custom requirements.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Custom Postcards

What size are your custom printed postcards?

Our custom postcards measure 4.00" x 5.625", which is the standard postcard size. This size qualifies for USPS postcard rates, making it cost-effective for direct mail marketing campaigns and personal communications.

What's the difference between matte and gloss postcard finishes?

Gloss finish provides vibrant colors with a shiny, reflective surface that's ideal for photo-heavy designs and marketing materials. Matte finish offers a non-reflective, sophisticated appearance that's easy to write on and reduces glare, making it perfect for text-heavy designs and elegant presentations.

How thick are your custom postcards?

Our postcards are printed on premium 12.4 pt, 120 lb. coverstock paper. This thickness provides a professional feel, durability during mailing, and meets USPS requirements for automated processing while maintaining standard postcard postage rates.

How do I design a custom postcard?

You can upload your own print-ready artwork in .eps, .ai, .pdf, or high-resolution .jpg formats, or utilize our professional design services for $60 per hour. Our designers can create custom layouts from your photos, text, and concepts to produce eye-catching postcards.

What information should I include on a custom postcard?

For business postcards, include your logo, contact information, call-to-action, and key message or offer. For personal postcards, include recipient address space, return address, and your message or announcement. Remember to follow USPS guidelines for address placement and postage area.

What production times are available for custom postcards?

We offer production times from 1 to 5 business days. Options include 1-day priority, 2-day express, 3-day standard (most popular), and 5-day saver. Production begins after artwork approval and payment processing.

Do you offer color matching for brand-specific colors?

Yes, we offer a Color Match Proof System for color-critical projects. This service ensures accurate reproduction of brand-specific colors and is recommended for professional marketing materials where color accuracy is essential.

What file types do you accept for custom postcard printing?

We prefer vector-based files (.eps, .ai) with fonts converted to outlines for best results. We also accept high-resolution .pdf and .jpg files at 300 DPI minimum. All files should be in CMYK color mode with appropriate bleed areas.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
